exactManualActions: Set FIMA_ADMIN_API_KEY locally without printing it, then run: node scripts/fetch-trial-license-backup.js
Verify trial-license-export.json exists, parses, has non-zero relevant record counts, and checksum matches backup-summary.json.
In Render, set TRIAL_PROMO_ENABLED=true, TRIAL_PROMO_DAYS=7, NORMAL_TRIAL_DAYS=1, TRIAL_PROMO_END_AT=<UTC ISO 7 days from activation>. Restart/deploy.
Verify /api/trial-promo active=true before running reset dry-run and disposable E2E.
nextRecommendedStep: Provide/run the admin-key protected backup fetch outside chat, verify the backup, then configure Render promo env. Resume with dry-run reset and disposable live E2E after backup exists.
